enums.name: BotMode
enums.description: Bot mode constants used to identify the current or desired mode of a bot.

enums.name: BotUnitType
enums.description: Unit list type constants used to filter nearby unit queries.

enums.name: BotItemPurchaseResult
enums.description: Result codes returned by item purchase actions.

enums.name: BotActionType
enums.description: Bot action type constants returned by GetCurrentActionType.

enums.name: AnimationActivity
enums.description: Animation activity constants returned by GetAnimActivity().

classes.name: BotsModeModule
classes.description:
Represents a bot mode or ability/item-usage module returned by `BotsInit.CreateGeneric()`.
Assign the lifecycle callbacks on this table to implement your mode logic.
All fields are optional: any that are left `nil` are silently skipped by the engine.

Typical usage inside a `mode_*_generic.lua` file:

  BotsInit = require("game/botsinit")
  local X = BotsInit.CreateGeneric()

  function X.GetDesire() return 0.5 end
  function X.OnStart() end
  function X.OnEnd()   end
  function X.Think()   end

  return X

fields.name: GetDesire
fields.description: Called every ~300 ms. Must return a float in [0, 1] that represents how much this mode wants to become (or remain) the active mode.

fields.name: OnStart
fields.description: Called once when this mode becomes the active mode.

fields.name: OnEnd
fields.description: Called once when this mode relinquishes control to another mode.

fields.name: Think
fields.description: Called every frame while this mode is active. Responsible for issuing all action-level commands.

classes.name: BotsInit
classes.description:
Utility table that creates generic bot mode / ability-usage modules.
Obtain it at the top of any generic override file with:

  BotsInit = require("game/botsinit")

See *Appendix A – Chaining to a generic implementation in Lua* in the
Valve Dota Bot Scripting documentation for the full workflow.

methods.name: CreateGeneric
methods.description:
Creates a new `BotsModeModule` table and, as a side-effect, redirects the **calling script's** global environment to that table via `setfenv`.
This means that top-level function declarations written *after* this call —
e.g. `function GetDesire() … end` — automatically become members of the returned
table (`X.GetDesire`) without needing an explicit `X.` prefix.

Call this once, near the top of your generic mode file, before defining any
of the lifecycle functions.
methods.returnDescription: The module table that must be `return`-ed at the end of the file.

classes.name: CDOTA_Bot

unitMethods.description: Returns the time in seconds since this unit was last damaged by any hero.

unitMethods.name: WasRecentlyDamagedByHero
unitMethods.description: Returns whether this unit was recently damaged by the given hero.

unitMethods.name: TimeSinceDamagedByHero
unitMethods.description: Returns the time in seconds since this unit was last damaged by the given hero.

unitMethods.name: WasRecentlyDamagedByPlayer
unitMethods.description: Returns whether this unit was recently damaged by the given player.

unitMethods.name: TimeSinceDamagedByPlayer
unitMethods.description: Returns the time in seconds since this unit was last damaged by the given player.

unitMethods.name: WasRecentlyDamagedByCreep
unitMethods.description: Returns whether this unit was recently damaged by a creep.

unitMethods.name: TimeSinceDamagedByCreep
unitMethods.description: Returns the time in seconds since this unit was last damaged by a creep.

unitMethods.name: WasRecentlyDamagedByTower
unitMethods.description: Returns whether this unit was recently damaged by a tower.

unitMethods.name: TimeSinceDamagedByTower
unitMethods.description: Returns the time in seconds since this unit was last damaged by a tower.

unitMethods.name: DistanceFromFountain
unitMethods.description: Returns the distance from this unit to the team fountain.

unitMethods.name: DistanceFromSecretShop
unitMethods.description: Returns the distance from this unit to the nearest secret shop.

unitMethods.name: DistanceFromSideShop
unitMethods.description: Returns the distance from this unit to the nearest side shop.

unitMethods.name: SetTarget
unitMethods.description: Sets the target unit for this bot.

unitMethods.name: GetTarget
unitMethods.description: Returns the current target unit of this bot.

unitMethods.name: SetNextItemPurchaseValue
unitMethods.description: Sets the gold value threshold for the next item purchase.

unitMethods.name: GetNextItemPurchaseValue
unitMethods.description: Returns the gold value threshold for the next item purchase.

unitMethods.name: GetAssignedLane
unitMethods.description: Returns the lane assigned to this bot.

unitMethods.description: Returns the offensive power of this unit.

unitMethods.name: GetRawOffensivePower
unitMethods.description: Returns the raw offensive power of this unit.

unitMethods.name: GetEstimatedDamageToTarget
unitMethods.description: Returns the estimated damage this unit would deal to the given target.

unitMethods.name: GetStunDuration
unitMethods.description: Returns the total stun duration this unit can apply.

unitMethods.name: GetSlowDuration
unitMethods.description: Returns the total slow duration this unit can apply.

unitMethods.name: HasBlink
unitMethods.description: Returns whether this unit has a blink ability.

unitMethods.name: HasMinistunOnAttack
unitMethods.description: Returns whether this unit has a ministun on attack.

unitMethods.name: HasSilence
unitMethods.description: Returns whether this unit has a silence ability.

unitMethods.name: HasInvisibility
unitMethods.description: Returns whether this unit has an invisibility ability.

unitMethods.name: UsingItemBreaksInvisibility
unitMethods.description: Returns whether using an item would break this unit's invisibility.

unitMethods.description: Returns a table of nearby barracks.

unitMethods.name: GetNearbyShrines
unitMethods.description: Returns a table of nearby shrines.

unitMethods.name: GetNearbyTrees
unitMethods.description: Returns a table of nearby tree IDs.

unitMethods.name: FindAoELocation
unitMethods.description: Returns the best location to cast an AoE ability to hit the most units.

unitMethods.name: GetExtrapolatedLocation
unitMethods.description: Returns the extrapolated location of this unit after the given time.

unitMethods.name: GetMovementDirectionStability
unitMethods.description: Returns a value in [0, 1] indicating how stable the movement direction has been.

unitMethods.name: HasModifier
unitMethods.description: Returns whether this unit has the given modifier.

unitMethods.name: GetModifierByName
unitMethods.description: Returns the modifier with the given name.

unitMethods.name: NumModifiers
unitMethods.description: Returns the number of modifiers on this unit.

unitMethods.name: GetModifierName
unitMethods.description: Returns the name of the modifier at the given index.

unitMethods.name: GetModifierStackCount
unitMethods.description: Returns the stack count of the modifier at the given index.

unitMethods.name: GetModifierRemainingDuration
unitMethods.description: Returns the remaining duration of the modifier at the given index.

unitMethods.name: GetModifierAuxiliaryUnits
unitMethods.description: Returns a table of auxiliary units for the modifier at the given index.

unitMethods.name: GetMostRecentPing
unitMethods.description: Returns information about the most recent ping from this player.

unitMethods.name: GetIncomingTrackingProjectiles
unitMethods.description: Returns a table of tracking projectiles currently targeting this unit.

abilityMethods.description: Returns whether this ability can be upgraded.

abilityMethods.name: GetTargetType
